vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF for git-unas. Generated by run v0.36.0.

narratives.Overview: A Node.js/TypeScript web admin page for Ubiquiti UNAS devices that enables git repository cloning, tar archiving, and file encryption. Served via nginx proxy on UniFi OS with a dark-themed UI matching UniFi's aesthetic.

items.title: Git repository cloning to NAS storage
Tar archiving of files and directories
